'''Farrfin''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Farrfin sector/Legends|Farrfin sector]] and the [[Farghul]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was a haven for criminals. A shakedown by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] left the Farghul distrustful of Jedi.

Farrfin was also a haven for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and eventually broke from the Empire with [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] support. The New Republic engaged [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in battle at Farrfin in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. Its population in that era was approximately six billion.

Farrfin had three major [[City/Legends|cities]]: [[Farlhu]], [[Jahhnu]], and [[Geltyu]]. A strong criminal element thrived in these cities, with con artists running [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] scams on every street corner, and pockets being picked often. The famed Jahhnu betting houses took in incredible sums of currency, as gullible off-worlders and bored smugglers gambled away their earnings.<ref name="TTS">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref>
